title: LolCat Backport
description: A super small Minecraft 1.8.9 forge mod that adds lolcat to your language options, language file based on the one from 1.9 but changed to match 1.8.9
body: This is a small mod that adds the lolcat language that 1.9+ has to 1.8.9, the language is added as an actual option to the language options instead of overwriting a language using a resourcepack which is better if you still want the ability to use another language occasionally.
